reason: Task-specific runtime integration requirements, acceptance criteria, and exclusions.
Review Wails service seam, generated binding contract, startup order, and UI persistence flow.
Verify anonymous identity and local-only product constraints remain intact.
Verify Go/Wails owns current-user persistence and no cloud/server profile was introduced.
Verify first-nickname validation and free-talk safety match the client UI contract.
Verify settings defaults and contracts have one owner rather than drifting across Go and TypeScript.
Verify generated binding is the explicit Go-to-React contract and error paths are tested.
